message:
feat(runtime): improve undo merge semantics, zero-prior safety, and input fairness tests

undo/command.rs: Change accept_merge() signature from &str to &dyn UndoableCmd
so merge implementations can access the full command (position, type, etc.)
instead of just text content. TextDeleteCmd now correctly differentiates
backspace vs forward-delete merges by comparing positions — backspace
prepends and updates position, forward-delete appends, non-adjacent deletes
are rejected. Split test into backspace and forward-delete variants with
explicit position assertions.

undo/history.rs: Update HistoryManager merge path to pass the full
command reference to accept_merge() instead of just merge text.

validation_pipeline.rs: Guard failure_prob() and variance() against
division by zero when alpha + beta == 0 (zero prior configuration),
returning uniform prior defaults (p=0.5, variance=1/12). Add test
zero_prior_defaults_to_uniform verifying finite scores.

input_fairness.rs: Add 11 comprehensive integration tests for the input
fairness subsystem — Jain index computation, intervention reason priority,
resize dominance thresholds, per-reason counter tracking, stability under
balanced workloads, degradation under resize floods, max latency tracking,
sliding window eviction, and custom config threshold validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
